user.title: RoomSense
user.description: Set up RoomSense to manage room climate. Rooms are configured in the RoomSense panel after setup.

restart_required.title: Restart required
restart_required.description: RoomSense {version} has been installed but Home Assistant is still running an older version. A restart is required to complete the update.

confirm_restart.title: Restart Home Assistant?
confirm_restart.description: Home Assistant will restart to load RoomSense {version}.
